fallback.answer: Sorry, I do not have enough information about that. Please contact Urban Threads Co. support at support@urbanthreads.example or +1-555-010-2020.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take?
faqs.answer: Standard delivery usually takes 3-5 business days after your order is confirmed.

faqs.question: Do you offer express shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes, express shipping is available in selected areas and usually takes 1-2 business days.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: At the moment, Urban Threads Co. only ships within the United States.

faqs.question: How much does shipping cost?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping costs $4.99. Orders over $75 qualify for free standard shipping.

faqs.question: How can I place an order?
faqs.answer: You can place an order by choosing your item, selecting size and color, adding it to cart, and completing checkout.

faqs.question: Can I change my order after placing it?
faqs.answer: You can request an order change within 2 hours of placing the order by contacting support.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: You can request cancellation within 2 hours of placing the order if it has not been processed yet.

faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking link by email.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

faqs.question: Do you offer cash on delivery?
faqs.answer: No, Urban Threads Co. does not offer cash on delivery at this time.

faqs.question: Is online payment secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, payments are processed through secure third-party payment providers. We do not store card details.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: You can return eligible items within 14 days of delivery if they are unused, unwashed, and have original tags attached.

faqs.question: Are sale items returnable?
faqs.answer: Final sale items cannot be returned unless they arrive damaged or incorrect.

faqs.question: How do I start a return?
faqs.answer: To start a return, contact support with your order number and reason for return.

faqs.question: How long does a refund take?
faqs.answer: Approved refunds are usually processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.

faqs.question: Can I exchange an item?
faqs.answer: Yes, exchanges are allowed within 14 days if the item is unused, unwashed, and has original tags attached.

faqs.question: Can I exchange for a different size?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can exchange for a different size if the requested size is available.

faqs.question: How do I choose the right size?
faqs.answer: Please check our size guide before ordering. If you are between sizes, we recommend choosing the larger size.

faqs.question: Do your clothes run small or large?
faqs.answer: Most Urban Threads Co. items fit true to size. Product pages may mention if an item has a relaxed or slim fit.

faqs.question: Do you restock sold out items?
faqs.answer: Popular items may be restocked. You can sign up for restock alerts on the product page when available.

faqs.question: Are product colors exactly like the photos?
faqs.answer: We try to show colors accurately, but slight color differences may happen because of screen settings and lighting.

faqs.question: Do you offer discount codes?
faqs.answer: Discount codes are sometimes shared through our email newsletter and seasonal promotions.

faqs.question: Can I use more than one discount code?
faqs.answer: Only one discount code can be used per order.

faqs.question: How can I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: You can contact Urban Threads Co. support at support@urbanthreads.example or +1-555-010-2020.

faqs.question: What are your customer support hours?
faqs.answer: Customer support is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM Eastern Time.
